name: 敢えて（あえて）
description: Expresses doing something deliberately or daringly despite difficulties or opposition; purposely choosing a challenging path

name: あくまでも
description: Expresses persistence or stubbornness; doing something to the very end or maintaining a position absolutely

name: 案の定（あんのじょう）
description: Expresses that something happened exactly as expected; just as one thought or predicted

name: あらかじめ
description: Expresses doing something beforehand or in advance; preparing or arranging something previously

name: あっての
description: Expresses that something exists or is possible only because of something else; owes everything to

name: ばこそ
description: Expresses that something happens only because of a specific condition; emphasizes the reason or cause

name: ば/たら + それまでだ
description: Expresses that if something happens, then everything is over or finished; indicates a final, irreversible outcome

name: べからず / べからざる
description: Strong prohibition or negative imperative; must not or should not do something (formal/literary)

name: べく
description: Expresses purpose or intention; in order to or for the purpose of doing something (formal)

name: べくもない
description: Expresses impossibility; cannot possibly be or happen; there is no way to do something

name: べくして
description: Expresses inevitability; something that is bound to happen or occurs naturally as expected

name: びる / びて / びた
description: Expresses appearing to be or behaving like something; to seem or act in a certain manner

name: ぶり / っぷり
description: Expresses manner, style, or way of doing something; describes how something is done or appears

name: ぶる / ぶって / ぶった
description: Expresses pretending or acting like something; behaving as if one has certain qualities or status

name: だに / だにしない
description: Expresses extreme degree; even or not even; emphasizes that something doesn't happen at all

name: だの～だの
description: Lists multiple items or examples; and, and the like, and so forth; used for enumeration

name: だろうに
description: Expresses regret or criticism; surely something should be the case, but it isn't; should have done something

name: であれ / であろうと
description: Expresses regardless of who, what, or how; whoever, whatever, however; even if it is

name: であれ～であれ
description: Expresses whether A or B; regardless of which option; used to show that the result is the same

name: でもあり～でもある
description: Expresses that something is both A and B; has multiple characteristics or qualities simultaneously

name: でも何でもない / くも何ともない
description: Expresses that something is not at all what it appears to be; nothing like that; not in the least

name: でなくてなんだろう
description: Expresses strong assertion; must be, is definitely; if not this, then what else could it be

name: ではあるまいか
description: Expresses speculation or suggestion; isn't it; I wonder if it's not; could it be that

name: ではあるまいし
description: Expresses that something is not the case; it's not like; it isn't as if; used to reject a comparison

name: では済まない（ではすまない）
description: Expresses that something won't end with just that; it will take more than; won't be settled easily

name: どうにも～ない
description: Expresses complete inability or impossibility; not by any means; cannot do anything about it

name: が早いか（がはやいか）
description: Expresses immediate action; no sooner than; as soon as something happens, something else occurs immediately

name: が/も～なら、～も～だ
description: Expresses negative comparison or connection; if A is bad, then B is also bad; both are equally problematic

name: がましい
description: Expresses resemblance with negative connotation; look like, sound like, somewhat like (often critical)

name: がてら
description: Expresses doing something while doing something else; at the same time; coincidentally; on the occasion of

name: ごとき / ごとく / ごとし
description: Expresses similarity or comparison; like, as if, the same as (formal/literary style)

name: ぐるみ
description: Expresses doing something together as a group or entirely; -wide, altogether, as a whole

name: 羽目になる（はめになる）
description: Expresses getting stuck with something unpleasant or unwanted; ending up having to do something unfortunate

name: ほどのことではない
description: Expresses that something is not worth doing or not necessary; no need to go that far; it's not that serious

name: ほうがましだ
description: Expresses preference for a lesser evil; would rather; it's better than the alternative (though not ideal)

name: 放題（ほうだい）
description: Expresses doing something as much as one pleases; leaving something uncontrolled; to one's heart's content

name: いかんだ / いかんによっては
description: Expresses dependence on circumstances; in accordance with; depending on how something is

name: いかんにかかわらず
description: Expresses regardless of circumstances; whether or not; irrespective of how something is

name: いかなる
description: Expresses any kind of; every; whatsoever; whatever (formal/emphatic form of どんな)

name: いかに
description: Expresses how, in what way, how much, to what extent; emphasizes degree or manner (formal)

name: いかにも
description: Expresses 'indeed; really; truly; just (like); very; extremely' to emphasize that something is exactly as expected or appears to be

name: いずれに + しても/しろ/せよ
description: Expresses 'anyhow; anyway; either way; in any case' to indicate that regardless of which option is chosen, the result is the same

name: じみた
description: Expresses 'to become; to appear like; to look like' to describe something that has taken on the characteristics or appearance of something else

name: か否か（かいなか）
description: Expresses 'whether or not' to present two contrasting possibilities or to question if something is true or false

name: かと思いきや（かとおもいきや）
description: Expresses 'contrary to expectations; or so we thought, but' to indicate that something unexpected happened after an initial assumption

name: 限りだ（かぎりだ）
description: Expresses 'to feel strongly' to indicate an extreme emotional state or the highest degree of a feeling

name: 甲斐もなく（かいもなく）
description: Expresses 'despite; even though' to indicate that efforts were made but the desired result was not achieved

name: 可能性がある（かのうせいが）
description: Expresses 'may/might; there's a possibility that' to indicate that something could happen or be true

name: からある / からする / からの
description: Expresses 'at least; as much as; as many as' to indicate a minimum quantity or degree that is considered significant

name: かれ～かれ
description: Expresses 'sooner or later; more or less' to indicate that something will happen eventually or to some degree

name: かたがた
description: Expresses 'while; at the same time; incidentally' to indicate doing two things simultaneously or taking advantage of an opportunity

name: かたわら
description: Expresses 'while; besides; at the same time; in addition' to indicate doing something alongside another activity

name: かつて
description: Expresses 'once; before; formerly; ever; former; ex-' to refer to something that happened in the past or a previous state

name: 嫌いがある（きらいがある）
description: Expresses 'bad habit; to have a tendency to' to indicate an undesirable tendency or inclination someone has

name: 切りがない（きりがない）
description: Expresses 'endless; boundless; there's no end to' to indicate that something continues indefinitely without limit

name: きっての
description: Expresses 'the most / greatest … of all' to indicate that something or someone is the best or most notable in a particular category

name: 極まる（きわまる）
description: Expresses 'extremely; very' to indicate that something has reached the highest degree or ultimate state

name: こそあれ
description: Expresses 'although; even though' to acknowledge a contrasting fact while emphasizing the main point

name: こそすれ
description: Expresses 'and; although; but' to indicate that while one thing is true, another contrasting thing is also true

name: こそ「～が・けれど」
description: Expresses 'but; although (emphasis)' to strongly emphasize a contrast or contradiction between two statements

name: ことごとく
description: Expresses 'altogether; entirely; completely' to indicate that something applies to all items or cases without exception

name: ことこの上ない
description: Expresses 'the most of all; the best; nothing is more ... than' to indicate the highest degree of something

name: こともあって
description: Expresses 'partly because; also because of' to indicate that something is one of several contributing factors

name: ことなしに
description: Expresses 'without doing something' to indicate that an action is performed without doing a particular thing

name: ことのないように
description: Expresses 'so as not to; to not' to indicate taking precautions to prevent something from happening

name: こととて
description: Expresses 'because; since' to provide a reason or explanation, often with a sense of inevitability

name: くらいなら
description: Expresses 'rather than (do ...)' to indicate a preference for one option over another, often an extreme preference

name: くらいのものだ
description: Expresses 'only (emphasis)' to indicate that something is the only thing of its kind or the sole exception

name: までだ / までのことだ
description: Expresses 'only; just; nothing else' to indicate that something is merely a simple matter or the only option

name: までもない / までもなく
description: Expresses 'there's no need to; it's not necessary to' to indicate that something is unnecessary or obvious

name: まじき
description: Expresses 'should not; must not' to indicate that something is inappropriate or forbidden, often in formal contexts

name: まくる
description: Expresses 'to do over and over again; to do relentlessly' to indicate doing something repeatedly or excessively

name: まみれ
description: Expresses 'covered with; stained; smeared with' to indicate being completely covered or soiled with something

name: まるっきり
description: Expresses 'completely; absolutely; totally; (not) at all' to emphasize the complete degree of something

name: めく
description: Expresses 'seems; show signs of; to have the appearance of' to indicate that something shows characteristics or signs of a particular state

name: も同然だ（もどうぜんだ）
description: Expresses 'just like; same as' to indicate that something is essentially equivalent to something else

name: もさることながら
description: Expresses 'one may well say so, but; not only... but also' to acknowledge one point while emphasizing another

name: もしないで
description: Expresses 'without even doing' to indicate that someone didn't even attempt to do something basic or expected

name: もはや
description: Expresses 'already; now; no longer; not anymore' to indicate that a situation has reached a point of no return or changed completely

name: もので
description: Expresses 'because; for that reason' to provide an explanation or justification, often with a sense of naturalness

name: ものを
description: Expresses regret or disappointment, meaning 'if only' or 'I wish it were not the case'

name: ものと思われる / ものと見られる
description: Expresses supposition or belief, meaning 'it is thought/believed/expected that'

name: ものとする
description: Expresses assumption or understanding, meaning 'shall assume' or 'understood as'

name: ものとして
description: Expresses assumption or supposition, meaning 'on the presumption that' or 'assuming that'

name: もしくは
description: Formal conjunction meaning 'or' or 'otherwise', used in written or formal contexts

name: んばかりに
description: Expresses extreme degree or manner, meaning 'as if' or 'as though' something were about to happen

name: んがために
description: Formal expression meaning 'in order to' or 'for the purpose of', emphasizing strong intention

name: ながらに / ながらの
description: Expresses maintaining a state while doing something, meaning 'while' or 'without change'

name: ないまでも
description: Expresses concession, meaning 'not to say' or 'although it does not reach the level of'

name: ないものでもない
description: Double negative expressing possibility, meaning 'is not entirely impossible' or 'might be possible'

name: ないものか / ないものだろうか
description: Expresses wishful thinking or desire, meaning 'isn't there' or 'can't we/I'

name: ないとも限らない（かぎらない）
description: Expresses possibility despite negative appearance, meaning 'not necessarily' or 'might'

name: なくしては
description: Expresses necessity or indispensability, meaning 'cannot do without' or 'must have'

name: 並み（なみ）
description: Expresses comparison or standard level, meaning 'average', 'ordinary', or 'on par with'

name: なんという / なんと / なんて
description: Expresses strong emotion or surprise, meaning 'how' or 'what a' (exclamatory)

name: 何しろ（なにしろ）
description: Expresses reason or explanation, meaning 'anyway', 'in any case', or 'because as you know'

name: ならでは
description: Expresses uniqueness or exclusivity, meaning 'distinctive of' or 'special to' someone/something

name: ならいざしらず / はいざしらず
description: Expresses contrast or exception, meaning 'I don't know about ... but' or 'if it were ... then maybe'

name: なり
description: Expresses immediate succession, meaning 'as soon as' or 'right after' something happens

name: なりに / なりの
description: Expresses appropriateness to one's situation, meaning 'in one's own way' or 'suitable to'

name: なりとも
description: Expresses minimum amount or degree, meaning 'at least' or 'even just a little'

name: なり～なり
description: Presents alternatives or examples, meaning 'either A or B' or 'for instance A or B'

name: なしに / なしで
description: Expresses absence or lack, meaning 'without' or 'without doing' something

name: に
description: Connects nouns to express combination or addition, meaning 'and' or 'in addition to'

name: に値する（にあたいする）
description: Expresses worthiness or merit, meaning 'to be worth' or 'to deserve'

name: にあって
description: Expresses circumstances or conditions, meaning 'at', 'during', or 'in the condition of'

name: に引き換え（にひきかえ）
description: Expresses contrast or comparison, meaning 'compared to' or 'in contrast to'

name: に至る / に至った（にいたる）
description: Expresses reaching a conclusion or result, meaning 'leads to' or 'come to'

name: に至るまで（にいたるまで）
description: Expresses extent or range, meaning 'as far as' or 'everything from ... to'

name: に至っても（にいたっても）
description: Expresses persistence of situation despite reaching a point, meaning 'even if' or 'although'

name: に至っては（にいたっては）
description: Expresses focus on a particular case, meaning 'when it comes to' or 'as for'

name: に言わせれば（にいわせれば）
description: Expresses someone's opinion or perspective, meaning 'if you ask' or 'according to'

name: に限ったことではない
description: Expresses that something is not limited to one case, meaning 'not limited to only'

name: にかかっては / にかかったら
description: Expresses dependency on someone's handling, meaning 'when handled by' or 'depending on who does it'

name: にかかっている
description: Expresses dependency or reliance, meaning 'depending on' or 'to depend on'

name: にかこつけて
description: Expresses using something as an excuse or pretext, meaning 'to use as a pretext'

name: にかまけて
description: Expresses being too busy or focused on one thing, meaning 'to be too busy' or 'to focus only on'

name: に難くない（にかたくない）
description: Expresses ease of doing something, meaning 'easy to do' or 'it's not hard to'

name: にまつわる
description: Expresses relation or association, meaning 'to be related to' or 'associated with'

name: に則って（にのっとって）
description: Expresses following rules or standards, meaning 'based on' or 'in accordance with'

name: に先駆けて
description: Expresses doing something prior to others or being the first to pioneer something; being ahead of others in taking action

name: に忍びない
description: Expresses being unable to bring oneself to do something or being unable to bear doing something due to emotional difficulty

name: にしたところで
description: Expresses 'even if' or 'even supposing that' something were the case, the result would still be the same

name: にして
description: Indicates specific conditions of time, position, or circumstances under which something occurs or is true

name: に即して
description: Expresses acting according to, in keeping with, or being based on certain principles, rules, or standards

name: に耐える
description: Expresses something being worth doing, able to withstand, or conversely, being unable to bear or endure something

name: に足らない
description: Expresses that something is not worthy of, not worth doing, or cannot reach a certain standard or level

name: に足る
description: Expresses that something is worthy of, worth doing, or can reach a certain standard or level of adequacy

name: に照らして
description: Expresses making judgments or decisions according to, in view of, or in light of certain standards or criteria

name: にとどまらず
description: Expresses that something is not limited to one thing but extends beyond; not only... but also

name: には無理がある
description: Expresses that something is difficult to do, unreasonable, or impossible due to inherent problems or contradictions

name: によらず
description: Expresses doing something regardless of certain conditions or circumstances; without being influenced by

name: に～を重ねて
description: Expresses achieving success through continuous effort, repeated attempts, or accumulated adjustments over time

name: にもほどがある
description: Expresses that there is a limit to what is acceptable; criticizing someone for going too far with something

name: にも増して
description: Expresses that something is more than, above, or exceeds something else in degree or intensity

name: には当たらない
description: Expresses that something is not worth doing or there is no need to do something; it doesn't warrant the action

name: には及ばない
description: Expresses that there is no need to do something, it's unnecessary, or something is no match for another

name: の至り
description: Expresses the utmost degree of something; extremely or to the highest extent of a feeling or state

name: の極み
description: Expresses the utmost or extreme degree of something; the pinnacle or height of a particular state or feeling

name: のなんのって
description: Expresses something being extremely intense or to such a degree that it cannot be expressed adequately in words

name: のやら
description: Expresses uncertainty, wondering, or not knowing about something; used when the speaker is unsure

name: のやら～のやら
description: Expresses uncertainty between two or more options; 'or this or that' when the speaker doesn't know which

name: を踏まえて
description: Expresses being based on something or taking something into account when making decisions or judgments

name: を経て
description: Expresses going through, by way of, after, or via something; indicates a process or passage of time/experience

name: を控えて
description: Expresses that something is soon to happen, the time has come, or something is ahead; anticipating an event

name: をいいことに
description: Expresses taking advantage of a situation or condition, often in a negative or opportunistic way

name: を顧みず
description: Expresses doing something despite consequences, not worrying about something, or regardless of certain factors

name: を限りに
description: Expresses starting from a certain point or marking the last time of a continued action; ending or beginning

name: を兼ねて
description: Expresses doing something also for the purpose of another thing; serving dual purposes or combining objectives

name: を皮切りに
description: Expresses starting with something and then continuing with similar actions; one after another beginning with

name: を機に
description: Expresses using something as an opportunity or chance to do something else; taking advantage of a situation

name: を禁じ得ない
description: Expresses being unable to help but feel something or being unable to refrain from a particular emotion or reaction

name: をものともせずに
description: Expresses acting in defiance of something or not being deterred by obstacles; not losing to or worrying about

name: をもって
description: Expresses means, method, or timing; by means of, with, or as of a certain time; formal expression of instrumentality

name: をおいて～ない
description: Expresses that there is only one option or alternative; can only be this person/thing and no other

name: を押して
description: Expresses overcoming opposition, pushing past obstacles, or doing something despite difficulties or objections

name: を境に
description: Expresses a significant change or turning point; indicates a large change before and after a certain event or time

name: を余儀なくされる
description: Expresses being forced to do something because there is no other choice; compelled by circumstances

name: をよそに
description: Expresses doing something despite or without regard to something else; ignoring or disregarding certain factors

name: を前提として
description: Expresses doing something with the intention or on the condition that something else is assumed or established

name: 思いをする
description: To think or feel something, often expressing deep emotions or experiences

name: 折に
description: When; at the time; on the occasion of something happening

name: およそ
description: About; roughly; generally; completely (used for approximation or emphasis)

name: さ
description: Ending particle that indicates assertion or emphasis in casual speech

name: さも
description: Really; truly; as if (expressing that something appears or seems a certain way)

name: さもないと
description: Otherwise; or else; if not (expressing consequences of not doing something)

name: さぞ
description: Surely; certainly; no doubt; indeed (expressing strong assumption or empathy)

name: 始末だ
description: End up; in the end; as a result (expressing negative outcomes or troublesome situations)

name: そばから
description: As soon as; right after (expressing immediate succession of actions)

name: そびれる
description: To miss a chance; to fail to do something (expressing missed opportunities)

name: 損なう/損じる
description: To do something wrong; miss a chance; fail to do something properly

name: 術がない
description: There is no way or means; cannot do anything about it

name: すら/ですら
description: Even (with emphasis, stronger than でも)

name: た弾みに/た拍子に
description: In the moment of; triggered by; as a result of doing something

name: たことにする/たことになる
description: Pretend to; contrary to the truth; decide to treat as if something happened

name: たところで
description: Even if; no matter (who, what, when, where, why, how)

name: たつもりはない
description: Have no intention to; didn't mean to do something

name: ただ～のみだ
description: All we can do is; can do nothing but; only (expressing limitation)

name: ためしがない
description: Is never the case; I have never seen or heard of such a thing

name: たら/たが最後
description: If you do... (negative result will follow); once you do...

name: たら～たで
description: If/in the case of... of course/should (expressing natural consequences)

name: たら～ところだ
description: If... (counterfactual condition), then would be (expressing hypothetical results)

name: たりとも
description: Not even; not any (emphatic negative, stronger than でも)

name: たるもの/たる
description: (That) which is; in the capacity of... should (expressing duty or expectation)

name: て敵わない
description: Can't bear to; unable to; troublesome to (expressing inability to endure)

name: てからというもの
description: Ever since; from the time when (expressing continuous state since an event)

name: てみせる
description: I'll do my best; I'll definitely do; I'll show you (expressing determination)

name: てしかるべきだ
description: Should; appropriate; it is natural to do (expressing what ought to be done)

name: て済むことではない
description: It's not enough to solve the problem; cannot be settled by just doing

name: てやまない
description: Always; never stop; can't help but (expressing continuous strong feeling)

name: 手前
description: Considering; before; in front of; one's standpoint (expressing position or obligation)

name: てもどうにもならない
description: It's no use; can't do anything about it even if you try

name: ても差し支えない
description: Can; it's okay if (giving permission or expressing that something is acceptable)

name: ても知らない
description: If you continue... you'll end up; I don't care what happens if you do

name: と相まって
description: Together with; combined with; because of... more (expressing combined effect)

name: とあれば
description: If it is the case that; if (expressing conditional with strong implication)

name: とあって
description: Due to the fact that; because of (expressing reason for a situation)

name: とばかりに
description: As if to say; as though (expressing manner or attitude)

name: といえども
description: Even if; even though; despite (formal expression of concession)

name: と言えなくもない
description: One can even say that; it can also be said that (expressing qualified agreement)

name: といい～といい
description: Expresses 'both ... and' or 'whether it be ... or', emphasizing that something applies to multiple aspects or alternatives.

name: といったらない
description: Expresses extreme degree, meaning 'extremely' or 'nothing more than this', emphasizing the intensity of a feeling or state.

name: という
description: Means 'all' or 'every single' with no exceptions, emphasizing completeness or totality of something.

name: というか～というか
description: Expresses hesitation or correction, meaning 'or rather' or 'or perhaps I should say', used when rephrasing or clarifying.

name: というもの
description: Indicates a period of time, meaning 'during', 'for', 'since', or 'over a period of time'.

name: というところだ
description: Expresses approximation or limitation, meaning 'at the most', 'no more than', 'at best', or 'roughly'.

name: というわけだ
description: Expresses conclusion or explanation, meaning 'that's why', 'no wonder', or 'it is the case that'.

name: というわけではない
description: Negates a conclusion, meaning 'it's not that' or 'it doesn't mean that', used to clarify or deny implications.

name: といわず～といわず
description: Expresses inclusiveness, meaning 'both', 'not only A or B, but overall', emphasizing that something applies comprehensively.

name: ときている
description: Expresses causation with emphasis, meaning 'because of' or 'what's more', often used to criticize or emphasize a reason.

name: とみると
description: Expresses immediate realization and subsequent action, meaning 'as soon as one realizes, then'.

name: と見るや（とみるや）
description: Expresses immediate action upon seeing something, meaning 'at the sight of', 'upon seeing', or 'after confirming'.

name: となると / となれば
description: Expresses conditional situations, meaning 'when it comes to', 'in such a case', or 'if that happens'.

name: とされる
description: Expresses general belief or consideration, meaning 'is considered to' or 'it is said that', often used for accepted facts.

name: ときたら
description: Expresses focus on a particular topic, meaning 'when it comes to' or 'concerning', often with criticism or emphasis.

name: ところを
description: Expresses contrast with timing or circumstances, meaning 'although (it is a certain time/condition)'.

name: ともあろうものが
description: Expresses surprise or criticism about someone's unexpected behavior, meaning 'of all people' with emphasis on disappointment.

name: ともなく / ともなしに
description: Expresses unconscious or unintentional action, meaning 'somehow', 'without knowing', or 'without thinking'.

name: ともすれば
description: Expresses tendency or likelihood, meaning 'apt to do', 'tend to', 'liable to', or 'prone to'.

name: とも～とも
description: Expresses inability to make a judgment, meaning 'unable to draw a conclusion' or 'unable to judge' between alternatives.

name: とりわけ
description: Expresses emphasis among multiple items, meaning 'especially' or 'above all', highlighting something particular.

name: としたことが
description: Expresses surprise about someone's unexpected mistake or behavior, meaning 'of all people, who would have thought?'

name: とっさに
description: Expresses immediate reaction or response, meaning 'at once', 'right away', or 'promptly', often in emergency situations.

name: とて
description: Expresses concession, meaning 'even', 'even if', or 'even though', used in formal or literary contexts.

name: とは
description: Expresses surprise or realization, meaning 'I didn't know', 'I was surprised that', or 'the fact that'.

name: とはいえ
description: Expresses concession or contrast, meaning 'though', 'although', 'be that as it may', or 'nonetheless'.

name: とは比べものにならない（くらべ）
description: Expresses incomparability, meaning 'can't compare with', emphasizing a significant difference in quality or degree.

name: とは打って変わって
description: Expresses complete contrast, meaning 'unlike', 'totally different', or 'very different from', emphasizing dramatic change.

name: つ～つ
description: Indicates two contrasting or alternating actions, meaning 'and', used in formal or literary contexts to show back-and-forth movement.

name: 尽くす（つくす）
description: Expresses complete exhaustion or using something up entirely, meaning 'to use up completely' or 'to exhaust'.

name: ってば / ったら
description: Expresses annoyance or emphasis when repeating something, meaning 'speaking of' or 'I told you already', showing frustration.

name: うちに入らない
description: Expresses dismissal or minimization, meaning 'not really' or 'can't be regarded as', suggesting something is insignificant.

name: わ
description: Feminine sentence ending particle used to express assertion, emotion, or emphasis in casual speech, primarily used by women.

name: はどうであれ
description: Expresses dismissal of conditions, meaning 'however' or 'whatever', indicating that something doesn't matter for the conclusion.

name: はおろか
description: Expresses extreme comparison, meaning 'let alone', 'not to mention', or 'needless to say', emphasizing that even more basic things are impossible.

name: はさておき
description: Expresses setting aside a topic, meaning 'setting aside' or 'putting aside', used to temporarily ignore something to focus on another matter.

name: はそっちのけで
description: Expresses ignoring one thing for another, meaning 'ignoring (one thing) for (another)' or 'instead of', showing misplaced priorities.

name: わ〜わで
description: Lists multiple negative things happening simultaneously, meaning 'and' when connecting unfortunate or problematic situations.

name: や否や（やいなや）
description: Expresses immediate succession of events, meaning 'as soon as' or 'the moment', emphasizing that something happens immediately after another action.

name: やしない
description: Expresses strong negation or impossibility, meaning 'should do, but don't' or 'there's no way', emphasizing that something definitely won't happen.

name: やれ～やれ
description: Pattern to give two representative examples, often with negative connotations or complaints

name: ようが / ようと
description: Expresses 'even if' or 'no matter how/what', indicating that the result remains the same regardless of the condition

name: ようが～ようが / ようと～ようと
description: Expresses 'no matter', 'whether', or 'even if [A] or [B]', showing that the outcome is unaffected by either alternative

name: ようによっては / ようでは
description: Means 'depending on the way' or 'according to how', indicating that results vary based on the method or approach

name: ようにも～ない
description: Expresses 'even if I wanted to... I couldn't', indicating inability to do something despite desire

name: ようと～まいと / ようが～まいが
description: Means 'whether or not' or 'regardless', expressing that the outcome is the same irrespective of the action

name: ゆえに
description: Formal expression meaning 'therefore', 'consequently', 'because of', or 'due to', used in written or formal contexts

name: ぞ・ぜ
description: Masculine ending particles that add force to statements or indicate commands, used in casual or rough speech

name: ずじまい
description: Expresses 'ended up not doing' something that was intended or expected to be done

name: ずには/ないでは + おかない
description: Expresses strong determination that something will definitely be done; 'cannot not do' or 'will definitely do'

name: ずには/ないでは + 済まない
description: Expresses obligation or inevitability; 'must do', 'will definitely', or 'can't help but do' something

name: ずとも
description: Means 'even without doing' or 'even without being', indicating that something is unnecessary for the result

name: ずくめ
description: Means 'completely', 'entirely', or 'nothing but', indicating that something consists entirely of one element
